message:
fix(node): security, storage, and idempotency hardening

revocation_freshness_gate:
- Split verify_proof() into immutable verification (&self) and separate
  nonce consumption — the verify step no longer mutates state, allowing
  callers to check proof validity without committing to consumption
  (INV-RFG-REPLAY-PRECHECK invariant)

idempotency_store:
- Fix capacity guard to distinguish new-key admission from slot reuse:
  replacing an expired or abandoned entry reuses its existing slot and
  should not trigger capacity rejection — was incorrectly blocking
  retry-after-expiry when the store was at capacity

frankensqlite_adapter:
- Reject duplicate audit log writes (AuditLog class) — audit entries
  are append-only by design; overwriting one would destroy evidence
- Use constant-time comparison (ct_eq_bytes) for integrity hash
  verification to prevent timing side-channels on stored data

retrievability_gate:
- Add segment_id dimension to target state tracking — was previously
  keyed only by (artifact_id, target_tier), meaning different segments
  of the same artifact in the same tier would collide silently
- All register_target/check_proof/evict paths updated for the new
  3-tuple key (artifact_id, segment_id, target_tier)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
